scripts.apk:low: npm run build:apk-low && npx cap sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk app/build/outputs/apk/debug/hexagons-freiger-low.apk
scripts.apk:high: npm run build:apk-high && npx cap sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk app/build/outputs/apk/debug/hexagons-freiger-high.apk
